title: Risk Review Meeting — 2024-04-21

# Risk Review Meeting — 2024-04-21

**Attendees:** Lena Okafor, Dev Patel

## Summary

This page covers the sonar frequency range for the Comms/Datalink subsystem. Key items discussed and actions agreed are recorded here.
